channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CAPILLARY] Capillary Tech: Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Capillary Technologies India Ltd submitted a Monitoring Agency Report by CRISIL Ratings Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, regarding the utilization of IPO proceeds, as per SEBI regulations. The report, reviewed by the Audit Committee on May 06, 2026, indicates no deviations from the IPO's stated objectives. The IPO issue size was ₹3,450.00 million, with net proceeds of ₹3,229.08 million after issue expenses of ₹220.92 million.

  • CRISIL Ratings issued a Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26.
  • No deviations reported in the utilization of IPO proceeds.
  • IPO gross proceeds were ₹3,450.00 million.
  • Net proceeds after issue expenses totaled ₹3,229.08 million.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capillary Technologies India Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [SULA] Sula Vineyards: Final Dividend of ₹2/Share Approved
item.description:
Sula Vineyards Ltd's board approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. A final dividend of ₹2 (100%) per share was recommended, compared to ₹3.6 (180%) for the previous year. The 23rd Annual General Meeting will be held on June 25, 2026, and the record date for dividend eligibility is May 22, 2026. The dividend will be paid within 30 days of shareholder approval at the AGM.

  • Audited FY26 financial results approved by the board.
  • Final dividend of ₹2 per share recommended.
  • AGM scheduled for June 25, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is May 22, 2026.
  • Dividend payment within 30 days of AGM approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sula Vineyards Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [DAMOINDUS] Damodar Industries Clarifies on Price Movement
item.description:
Damodar Industries Ltd. responded to an exchange query regarding significant price movement in its stock. The company stated that it has been compliant with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, by disclosing all applicable events and price-sensitive information within the stipulated timelines. Furthermore, the company confirmed that neither its promoters nor any related parties have engaged in trading its shares. The company attributes the price movement to market circumstances beyond its control or knowledge.

  • Damodar Industries confirms compliance with SEBI regulations regarding information disclosure.
  • The company states no promoter or related party trading in its shares.
  • Price movement attributed to market conditions beyond company control.
  • Company confirms no unreported price-sensitive information.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DAMODAR INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Clarification

item.title: [TANFACIND] TANFAC Industries: FY26 Revenue Up 27.7% to ₹711 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TANFAC Industries Ltd reported its highest-ever performance for FY26, with revenue reaching ₹711 crores, a 27.7% YoY increase. Q4 revenue stood at ₹193 crores, up 12.3% YoY. The company's EBITDA was impacted by higher operating costs, but it expects improved operating leverage from its Solar Grade DHF project. PAT was subdued due to lower operating profit and higher depreciation. The board recommended a final dividend of ₹4.5 per equity share. TANFAC is expanding its downstream fluorinated product portfolio with a ₹495 crore investment and has secured long-term supply contracts worth approximately ₹3,612 crores.

  • TANFAC's FY26 revenue reached ₹711 crores, a 27.7% increase year-over-year.
  • The company announced a ₹495 crore investment in downstream fluorinated product manufacturing.
  • A final dividend of ₹4.5 per share was recommended by the board.
  • Long-term supply contracts for fluorinated products total approximately ₹3,612 crores.
  • Solar Grade DHF project commissioned, with orders worth ₹1,068 crores to be executed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TANFAC INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [WAAREEENER] Waaree Subsidiary Enters PPA with SECI for 300MW Wind Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Waaree Forever Energies Four Private Limited, a wholly-owned step-down subsidiary of Waaree Energies Ltd, has entered into a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI) for the development of a 300MW Wind Power Project in Dwarka, Gujarat. The PPA was executed on May 06, 2026.

  • Waaree subsidiary to develop 300MW wind power project in Dwarka, Gujarat.
  • Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) signed with Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI).
  • The PPA was executed on May 06, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Waaree Energies Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MEESHO] Meesho Monitoring Agency Report for Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
item.description:
Meesho Ltd has released the Monitoring Agency Report by CRISIL Ratings Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, regarding the utilization of funds raised through its IPO. The report, in compliance with SEBI regulations, indicates no deviations from the IPO's stated objectives. Net proceeds from the IPO were revised to ₹41,004.90 million due to lower-than-estimated issue expenses. The report is available on the company's website.

  • Meesho releases Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 ended March 31, 2026.
  • CRISIL Ratings Limited issued the report on IPO fund utilization.
  • No deviations reported from the IPO's stated objectives.
  • Net IPO proceeds revised to ₹41,004.90 million.
  • Report complies with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meesho Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [GMDCLTD] GMDC Board Meeting on 14 May 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Gujarat Mineral Development Corporation Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the recommendation of a dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • GMDC board to approve audited financial results on May 14, 2026.
  • Board will consider recommending a dividend for FY 2025-26.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT MINERAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KANSAINER] Kansai Nerolac Appoints D. C. Dave & Co. as Cost Auditor
item.description:
Kansai Nerolac Paints Ltd. has appointed D. C. Dave & Co., Cost Accountants, as the Cost Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. The appointment was approved by the Board of Directors at their meeting held on May 6, 2026. D. C. Dave & Co. is a firm with over three decades of experience, specializing in cost audits, certifications, and management accounting, serving diverse industries.

  • D. C. Dave & Co. appointed as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Appointment approved by the Board on May 6, 2026.
  • D. C. Dave & Co. has over 30 years of experience in cost accounting.
  • The firm specializes in cost audits and management accounting.
  • D. C. Dave & Co. serves clients across various industries.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KANSAI NEROLAC PAINTS LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [PARLEIND] Parle Industries: Company Secretary Resignation & Appointment
item.description:
Parle Industries Ltd. announced the resignation of Mr. Bharat Kumar Bohra as Company Secretary, effective May 6, 2026. Simultaneously, Ms. Rajshree V. Chimbaikar (Membership No. A31011) has been appointed as the new Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, also effective May 6, 2026. The decisions were made during a Board Meeting held on May 6, 2026, which commenced at 05:30 p.m. and concluded at 06:50 p.m.

  • Bharat Kumar Bohra resigned as Company Secretary, effective May 6, 2026.
  • Rajshree V. Chimbaikar appointed as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective May 6, 2026.
  • Chimbaikar has over 14 years of post-qualification experience.
  • Board meeting held on May 6, 2026, to approve the changes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Parle Industries Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BAJAJ-AUTO] Bajaj Auto Recommends ₹150 Dividend Per Share
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Bajaj Auto Ltd has recommended a dividend of ₹150 per equity share of ₹10 each for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The dividend, if approved by shareholders at the Annual General Meeting on July 21, 2026, will be credited/dispatched around July 24, 2026. The record date for determining shareholders eligible for the dividend is set as May 29, 2026.

  • Bajaj Auto recommends a dividend of ₹150 per share.
  • Dividend is for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • AGM to be held on July 21, 2026 for shareholder approval.
  • Dividend payout targeted around July 24, 2026.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is May 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAJAJ AUTO LTD. | Category: Dividend
